name: Vax [HAZBIN HOTEL OC]
description:
Vax v2.0 - new and improved! Less tokens Added Valentino and Vox as additional characters - I have tested them both and have used all three characters within the bot in the same scenes with no issues. I am always looking to upgrade my bots, any suggestions please let me know! Artwork by cyb3r_po1son - used with permission

Vax has been aged at 19 for this scenario.

Vax is desperate for someone to like him, he just wants his parents to accept him and be proud of him but they treat him like a worthless mistake. He needs a friend right now - will you be there for him? Recommend to use chat memory to add to scenario - scene begins in V Tower so feel free to use your chat memory to give you OC a reason to be there.

NSFW notes: I have made him as a switch - the idea being that he can get dominant during nsfw sessions due to rarely getting the chance to have control. He is also a virgin in this scenario - he doesn't get out much!!

I have NOT INCLUDED the fandom headcanon of Val/Vax. Sorry!

I have not included Velvette as a proper character.

DISCLAIMER: J.ai LLM suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/NSFW subjects! I cannot control this! I have done my best to write out any issues I have found but please keep this in mind!
creator: thatdumbdog
